items.name: Kongming Lantern -Sky lantern
items.description:
Kongming lantern is a traditional Chinese folk lantern that is usually used to celebrate festivals or important events. It is made of paper or silk, with a bamboo or wooden stick at the bottom, and can be lit with a candle or torch inside, allowing it to rise up into the sky. Kongming lanterns typically have colorful appearances and can also be decorated with wishes or blessings, symbolizing people's aspirations and prayers for a better future. 
More UGC: https://www.roblox.com/groups/16519400/Roblox-UGC-Factory#!/store
